code:
model = Sketchup.active_model
sel = model.selection.to_a
if sel.empty?
  { 'ok' => false, 'error' => 'no objects selected' }
else
  model.start_operation('AWARE rotate selected', true)
  t = Geom::Transformation.rotation(Geom::Point3d.new(0, 0, 0), Geom::Vector3d.new(0, 0, 1), 45.degrees)
  model.entities.transform_entities(t, sel)
  model.commit_operation
  { 'ok' => true, 'rotated' => sel.length, 'degrees' => 45, 'axis' => 'Z' }
end
